mapper.select: SELECT f.friend_user_id AS friendUserId, u.user_no AS userNo, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, f.remark AS remark, COALESCE(NULLIF(f.remark, ''), u.nickname) AS displayName FROM im_friend f JOIN im_user u ON u.id = f.friend_user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC, f.id DESC

SELECT f.friend_user_id AS friendUserId, u.user_no AS userNo, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, f.remark AS remark, COALESCE(NULLIF(f.remark, ''), u.nickname) AS displayName FROM im_friend f JOIN im_user u ON u.id = f.friend_user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 2 ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC, f.id DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, friend_user_id AS friendUserId, remark, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_user_id = #{friendUserId} LIMIT 1
